tracking_number.description:
This contains all shipping details as provided by the card fulfillment provider, including the tracking
number. This field is deprecated. Instead, please use the fulfillment_details object, which includes a
field for just the tracking number.
tracking_number.example: Ship Date [2022-07-19], Shipping Method [UPS Next Day Air Saver]; Tracking Number [1ZW3268W1319325382]
